description: Unauthorized access to patient analytics database via compromised service account credentials
notes: Service account creds found on dark web marketplace. No evidence of data exfiltration beyond initial access.

description: CrowdStrike alert — suspected lateral movement from developer workstation to staging server
notes: Attacker exploited unpatched RDP vulnerability on staging server

description: GuardDuty alert — anomalous API calls from IAM role assumed by unknown external account
notes: External account traced to former contractor whose IAM cross-account trust was not revoked

description: Anomalous outbound data transfer from analytics processing cluster — 4.7 GB to unfamiliar S3 bucket
notes: Investigation confirmed: authorized data pipeline replication to new DR bucket. Engineering team created bucket without notifying security. False positive.

description: Ransomware execution on SFTP gateway server — patient data import pipeline affected
phi_involved: Yes — SFTP contained inbound patient data files
notes: CrowdStrike auto-isolated. 3 patient data files in transit were encrypted by ransomware.

description: Employee accessed patient dashboard without valid business justification — flagged by DLP
notes: Handled via HR. Employee was curious about a family member's data. Terminated per policy.

description: WAF bypass — HTTP request smuggling attack reached application layer
notes: Novel HTTP/2 desync technique. Application-layer WAF rules did not parse smuggled requests.

description: Brute force attack on VPN gateway — 15000 failed auth attempts from Tor exit nodes
notes: All attempts blocked by MFA. Source IPs added to blocklist.
